text.p: I submitted a paper titled ‚ÄúTackling corruption through all the applicable media in ‚Ä? and subsequently got a letter dated intimating that my paper will be published in the book ‚Äì Media discourse in . I was looking at my files and I came across your email address so I decided to contact you to find out if the publication is out. Kindly let me know so that I can arrange how to get a copy. Thanks and have a nice day.
